requirement.description: When engine temperature exceeds the safe operating limit, the system shall immediately activate the high-temperature warning.

test_cases.test_objective: Verify HighTempWarn activates when engine temperature exceeds safe limit.
test_steps: Increase EngineTemp above limit via CAPL

test_cases.test_objective: Verify HighTempWarn activates exactly at threshold crossing.
test_cases.expected_result: HighTempWarn transitions 0 → 1 within one CAN frame

test_cases.test_objective: Verify HighTempWarn remains inactive below threshold.
Verify HighTempWarn remains active while temperature stays above limit.
Verify HighTempWarn activates regardless of vehicle speed.
Verify HighTempWarn activation independent of door states.
test_cases.expected_result: HighTempWarn remains active independent of door status
HighTempWarn asserted in first frame after crossing

test_cases.test_objective: Verify deterministic activation for repeated over-temperature events.
test_cases.expected_result: Consistent HighTempWarn behavior across all cycles
